name: cut
description: Cut plane for clipping clump visualization. Shows only material on one side of a defined plane.

keywords.description: Enable cut plane on clump plot item
keywords.syntax: cut active on type plane surface on front on back off origin (<x>,<y>,<z>) normal (<nx>,<ny>,<nz>)
examples: cut active on type plane surface on front on back off origin (0,0,0) normal (1,0,0)
cut active on type plane surface on front off back on origin (0.1,0.2,0.3) normal (0.577,0.577,0.577)

available_parameters.active: on | off — enable or disable the cut plane
available_parameters.surface: on | off — show the cut surface
available_parameters.front: on | off — show material in front of cut plane
available_parameters.back: on | off — show material behind cut plane
available_parameters.origin: (x,y,z) — a point on the cut plane
available_parameters.normal: (nx,ny,nz) — normal direction of the cut plane

keywords.notes: Typically front=on back=off to view one half, or front=off back=on for the other. Both on shows full model with surface highlight.

keywords.description: Disable cut plane, restoring full visualization

usage_in_creation: plot "<name>" item create clump active on cut active on type plane surface on front on back off origin (0,0,0) normal (1,0,0)
usage_in_modification: plot "<name>" item modify <id> cut active on type plane surface on front off back on origin (0,0,0) normal (0,1,0)
notes: Verified via PFC 7.0 interactive testing. Inline cut parameters in item creation and modification commands work reliably.
Cut plane syntax is identical across ball, clump, contact, and wall item types.
